concrete_change: If this no-VE negation is competitive, keep `USE_VALUE_EMBEDDINGS = False`, set `DEPTH = 10`, and lower `ASPECT_RATIO` to 48 so the added layers arrive without also widening the model.
emergent_thought: Only after we learn whether plain attention can stay competitive should we convert the removed novelty tax into extra depth; otherwise the branch risks mixing simplification and capacity changes before the antithesis is even real.
